---
title: "Image Gallery"
---

## Ravenshaw University

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](images/Ravenshaw/rugeo1.jpeg){.lightbox group="ravenshaw"}
![](images/Ravenshaw/rugeo2.jpeg){.lightbox group="ravenshaw"}
:::

## ANVESHAN Student Research Convention

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](images/Ravenshaw/1.jpg){.lightbox group="anveshan"}
![](images/Ravenshaw/2.jpg){.lightbox group="anveshan"}
:::

## IIT Bombay

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](images/IIT%20Bombay/1.jpg){.lightbox group="iitb"}
![](images/IIT%20Bombay/2.jpg){.lightbox group="iitb"}
:::

## Academic & Field Work

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Ganpat University](images/Ganpat%20University/guni1.jpeg){.lightbox group="field"}
![Ganpat University](images/Ganpat%20University/guni4.JPG){.lightbox group="field"}
![BHU Workshop](images/BHU/BHU4.jpg){.lightbox group="field"}
![BHU Workshop](images/BHU/BHU3.jpg){.lightbox group="field"}
:::

## NAGI (Ranchi University)

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](images/NAGI/NAGI1.jpg){.lightbox group="nagi"}
![](images/NAGI/NAGI2.jpg){.lightbox group="nagi"}
![](images/NAGI/NAGI3.jpg){.lightbox group="nagi"}
![](images/NAGI/NAGI4.jpg){.lightbox group="nagi"}
:::

## Featured Engagements

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![GDG Nairobi Presentation](images/gdg.jpg){.lightbox group="engagements"}
![MSB University Resource Person](images/resource2.jpg){.lightbox group="engagements"}
![Centurion University Training](images/resource1.png){.lightbox group="engagements"}
:::
